nodes.name: agg.toml
nodes.summary: Test configuration for state cleaning tests covering aggregation operators, defining test cases to verify that expired state is correctly cleaned up for aggregation nodes.

nodes.name: join.toml
nodes.summary: Test configuration for state cleaning tests covering join operators, defining test cases to verify that expired join state (left/right side buffers) is correctly cleaned up.

nodes.name: temporal_filter.toml
nodes.summary: Test configuration for state cleaning tests covering temporal filter operators, defining test cases to verify that rows older than the time window are correctly evicted from state.
